title: Evidence Weave Card
prompt:
Create a production-ready Evidence Weave Card using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original card summarizes three independent signals as woven strips; choosing one strip brings its short rationale into the footer while the other strips remain readable. Use a premium light Bento composition: white card on #F4F5F6, 22px radius, #ECECEE border, soft neutral shadow, #111111 headings, and #4A4A4F supporting text. Use only a cyan selected strip as a bright accent. Do not use gradients on the card or rely on hover to reveal information.

Implement the strips as a labelled group of real 44px buttons with aria-pressed. Click, Enter, and Space select a strip, and a polite live region announces the selected evidence. Hover may lift a strip 2px over 180ms and press may compress it 1px over 90ms. Move the active weave marker with a stiffness 320, damping 28 spring and fade the rationale in over 160ms ease-out. The selected state must remain obvious from text and outline as well as color. Keep all state local and avoid timers, random data, browser storage, network activity, remote images, and dynamic code.

At 320px, stack the strips without clipping labels; at larger widths, retain generous whitespace for a detail preview. Keep a dark visible focus ring, logical tab order, semantic heading structure, and AA contrast. Honor prefers-reduced-motion by using an instant selected marker or a 120ms opacity fade. Return a full client component, then a pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML that preserves the core selection behavior.

code.css:
/* HTML: <section class="evidence-weave"><button aria-pressed="true">Usage</button></section> */
.evidence-weave{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff}.evidence-weave button{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;width:100%;min-height:44px;margin-top:8px;padding:0 12px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;font-weight:800}.evidence-weave button[aria-pressed=true]{border:2px solid #111;background:#e6fbff}.evidence-weave button[aria-pressed=true]::after{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;background:#38bdf8;content:""}.evidence-weave button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.evidence-weave *{transition:none}}

demoCode:
(() => {function Demo(){const [a,setA]=React.useState(0),rows=[['Usage','18 teams saved a review step'],['Risk','No blocking dependency'],['Owner','Design has signed off']];return
EVIDENCE WEAVEDecision signals{rows.map((r,i)=>setA(i)} whileTap={{y:1}} style={{display:'flex',justifyContent:'space-between',alignItems:'center',width:'100%',minHeight:40,marginTop:8,border:a===i?'2px solid #111':'1px solid #ececee',borderRadius:12,background:a===i?'#e6fbff':'#fff',fontWeight:800}}>{r[0]})}

{rows[a][0]}: {rows[a][1]}
